step.name: scaffold-three-databases
step.action: Create Projects, Tasks, Sprints databases. Add ≤20 properties each. Use Status property type for task workflow.

step.name: wire-relations-and-rollups
step.action: Add Tasks↔Projects + Tasks↔Sprints relations. Configure Rollups for completed count, total estimate, % complete. Forbid formula iteration.
step.decision-gate: If a metric requires formula iteration, redesign as a Rollup with filter before continuing.

step.name: purpose-specific-views
step.action: Create Board (current sprint, grouped by Status), Table (sortable), Timeline (by Project, date range), Calendar (filtered not-Done). No catch-all view.

step.name: api-integration-with-rate-limit
step.action: Cap writes at 3 req/sec. Use databases.query with filter trees + pagination. Resolve property names exactly. Require human checkpoint for >50 bulk writes.

step.name: archive-policy
step.action: Move Status=Done + completed sprints older than cutoff to Archive database via linked database. Keep live Tasks under 500 rows.
